Envy (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $13,548,322Details
International Box Office $1,017,924
Worldwide Box Office $14,566,246
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,160,886 (45.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.20 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:93.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,445 opening theaters/2,445 max. theaters, 2.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $26,093,060

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 30th, 2004 (Wide) by Dreamworks SKG
Video Release: September 28th, 2004 by Dreamworks Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for language and sexual/crude humor
Running Time: 99 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Frat Pack
Plot point: Inventor, Rags to Riches
Subgenre: Black Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Black Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Castle Rock Entertainment, DreamWorks Pictures, Village Roadshow Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
